deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement 5/29. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting. Short sale analysis completed - underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified but sellers chose to hold and improve property.
deals.next: Confirm signed termination release received from sellers

logs.m: Listing terminated - mutual agreement to pause and relist after repairs
Presented three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close
Where Things Stand email sent with full market analysis and payoff details

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Live listing since May 14. Multiple showings in progress. Second-look buyers showing strong interest - property is their favorite. Recommended list price $259,900. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June - high urgency. Potential hairline foundation crack flagged.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time and follow up with second-look buyers agent on movement

logs.m: Multiple showings progressing - second-look buyers are hottest lead
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed - keeping conversation open
MLS live - first showing 9:15am with showing feedback received

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce situation - need to sell property. Payoff confirmed at $255,578 as of Feb 2026, approximately $257,000 today. Thin market with only 3 comps in 10-mile radius. Recommended list price $295,000 would net sellers approximately $14,700 after costs. Get updated payoff letter before listing.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender and get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property - pulled CMA and payoff confirmation. Discussed net proceeds scenarios.
Prior clients - Chris helped with original VA renovation loan purchase

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO - cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring starts this week. Water meter pending. Drywall and paint finishing up. 3 cameras installed. HouzzPro contractor (Matt Toney) managing the work which started May 9.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utility setup status. Replace camera batteries on next visit.

logs.m: Flooring starting this week - baseboards after. Water meter 1-2 days out.
Drywall crew patching remaining holes - photos sent to Kelly
Floor demo complete - drywall cut and new drywall on site

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property under contract with Espinoza family at $113,000. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier for signature. EMD not yet received. Steve signed T-47 via DocuSign. Chicago Title handling escrow with Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email address.

New buyer identified - Espinoza family. Amendment sent to Javier.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale closed and funded April 27, 2026. Cash transaction for $152,000. Lien blocker resolved April 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Military buyer through Exquisite SA. Chicago Title handled closing.

Contract executed
